meaning: n.蔬菜,植物,生活呆板单调的人adj.蔬菜的,植物的
examples: Severe brain damage turned him into a vegetable.
The vegetable harvest is disastrously behind schedule.
Peas, beans and lentils are a good source of vegetable protein.
We were a seafood-friendly group, so our meal leaned toward vegetable- and seafood-based plates.
'IF I'M THINKING about vegetable dishes, " said Renee Erickson, "I'm interested in textural differences.
